_comment: Deterministic demo markets for the Clawdius agent. Edit freely — the Mock data source reloads on each process start. Prices are point-in-time snapshots; price_history synthesises the walk deterministically from the market id.

markets.title: Will Bitcoin close above $150,000 at the end of Q2 2026?
markets.description: Resolves YES if the BTC/USD close on Coinbase at 2026-06-30T23:59:59Z is strictly greater than $150,000.00. Data source: Coinbase BTC-USD candle. Operator: HuggyArena oracle multisig.

markets.title: Will the Democratic nominee win the 2028 US Presidential Election?
markets.description: Resolves YES if the Democratic Party candidate wins an Electoral College majority per Associated Press call after polls close on 2028-11-07. Popular-vote winner is not the resolution criterion.

markets.title: Will Sam Bankman-Fried be released from federal custody before 2030-01-01?
markets.description: Resolves YES if, at any point before 2030-01-01T00:00:00Z, the Federal Bureau of Prisons inmate record for Samuel Bankman-Fried shows a release status (not parole-adjacent transfer). Source: bop.gov inmate locator.

markets.title: Will a public AI model exceed 90% on ARC-AGI-2 before 2027-01-01?
markets.description: Resolves YES if the official ARC Prize public leaderboard shows any submission with a final score ≥ 0.9 on ARC-AGI-2 before 2027-01-01T00:00:00Z. Rumoured, leaked, or unverified runs do not count.

markets.title: Will Real Madrid win the 2025-26 UEFA Champions League?
markets.description: Resolves YES if Real Madrid CF lifts the UCL trophy in the 2025-26 final. Source: UEFA official result.

markets.title: Will the FOMC cut the federal funds rate at the July 2026 meeting?
markets.description: Resolves YES if the FOMC announces a reduction in the target federal funds rate at the July 28-29, 2026 meeting. Source: federalreserve.gov press release.

markets.title: Will a US-listed spot ETH ETF begin offering staking rewards in 2026?
markets.description: Resolves YES if any SEC-registered spot ETH ETF publicly begins distributing staking rewards to shareholders at any point during calendar-year 2026. Source: ETF issuer press release + SEC filing.

markets.title: Will a crewed Mars landing occur before 2030-01-01?
markets.description: Resolves YES if a crewed spacecraft carrying at least one human has made a confirmed, survived landing on the Martian surface before 2030-01-01T00:00:00Z. Source: joint confirmation from a recognised space agency (NASA, ESA, CNSA, Roscosmos, SpaceX).
